title: Contact Us
description: Use this page for questions, corrections, feedback, or site-related requests.

sections.title: General Contact
paragraphs: For now, the best public reference for the original game is the GitHub project linked in the footer.
If you operate this site, replace this section with your preferred support email, contact form link, or business address.

sections.title: Helpful Details To Include
items: The page or feature your message is about.
Your browser and device if you are reporting a display or gameplay issue.
A short description of what happened and what you expected to happen.
